reviews.review_description: I load up the game to try the game and I can’t even move and I can’t open my oculus menu and when I turn it off I’m js stuck so this game is annoying and needs to be fixed and now I can’t play anything on my vr

developer_response.body: Im sorry you experienced this, I do believe that thing where you couldn't open your menu was a glitch from the headset. Have you tried playing the game after you experienced this?

reviews.review_description: Ok so looking in the description says INTERNET NOT REQUIRED now now now I will die if I don't have internet that's scary ASF
